bird.name: 加岛企鹅
bird.summary: 加岛企鹅（台湾作加拉巴哥環企鵝，学名：Spheniscus mendiculus），又稱加拉帕戈斯企鵝、加島環企鵝，為環企鵝屬的企鵝，分布於南美洲外海的科隆群岛，是唯一一種分布於熱帶，乃至赤道以北的企鵝。由于受到秘鲁寒流和克伦威尔洋流的共同影响，科隆群岛的环境气温远低于赤道其他…

relations.subject: 加岛企鹅
relations.evidence: They have been critically impacted to the point of endangerment by climate change and pollution caused by plastic waste due to tourism and urbanization.{{Citation |last1=Alava |first1=Juan José |title=Pollution as an Emerging Threat for the Conservation of the Galapagos Marine Reserve: Environmental Impacts and Management Perspectives |date=2014 |work=The Galapagos Marine Reserve: A Dynamic Social-Ecological System |pages=247–283 |editor-last=Denkinger |editor-first=Judith |series=Social and Ecological Interactions in the Galapagos Islands |place=Cham |publisher=Springer International Publishing |language=en |doi=10.1007/978-3-319-02769-2_12 |isbn=978-3-319-02769-2 |last2=Palomera |first2=Carlos |last3=Bendell |first3=Leah |last4=Ross |first4=Peter S
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

relations.subject: 加岛企鹅
relations.evidence: They have been critically impacted to the point of endangerment by climate change and pollution caused by plastic waste due to tourism and urbanization.{{Citation |last1=Alava |first1=Juan José |title=Pollution as an Emerging Threat for the Conservation of the Galapagos Marine Reserve: Environmental Impacts and Management Perspectives |date=2014 |work=The Galapagos Marine Reserve: A Dynamic Social-Ecological System |pages=247–283 |editor-last=Denkinger |editor-first=Judith |series=Social and Ecological Interactions in the Galapagos Islands |place=Cham |publisher=Springer International Publishing |language=en |doi=10.1007/978-3-319-02769-2_12 |isbn=978-3-319-02769-2 |last2=Palomera |first2=Carlos |last3=Bendell |first3=Leah |last4=Ross |first4=Peter S
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: 加岛企鹅
relations.evidence: Other threats include humans harvesting penguins for oil and other products, competition with fisheries for krill and other fish, habitat loss, increased predation from invasive species, bycatch, and pollution.{{Cite journal |last1=Trathan |first1=Phil N
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
